comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound animate framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound animate framed dispatch/decode; not entity existence, animation semantics, initialized Entity/Level behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound animate packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official STREAM_CODEC decode fixture with entity id 123 and SWING_MAIN_HAND only; it does not prove entity existence, animation semantics, initialized Entity/Level behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
